hero.title: Complete i18n Testing
hero.description: Try all i18n features: translation, pluralization, number formatting, currency, and currency conversion.

numbers.title: Number Formatting
numbers.description: Numbers formatted according to active language locale.

currency.title: Currency Formatting
currency.description: Prices in USD converted to active language currency.

currency_comparison.title: Currency Comparison
currency_comparison.description: Same price ($99 USD) in all supported currencies.

form.title: Form with Translated Placeholders
form.description: Placeholders and labels loaded from locale files.

missing_keys.title: Missing Key Handler
missing_keys.description: Missing keys are displayed in square brackets.

html_content.title: HTML Content
html_content.description: Translations can include HTML tags for styling.
html_content.example: This is an example with colored highlight and bold text.
html_content.note: Note: HTML in translations must have a single root element.

switcher.title: Switch Language
switcher.description: Click buttons below to change language and see i18n in action.

advanced.title: Advanced Formatting
advanced.description: Advanced formatting features for percentages, units, bytes, lists, and ordinals.
